DEF NOTICE OF FELONY APPEAL FILED

DA RESPONSE TO INITIAL PETITION FOR RESENTENCING PC1170,95 FILED
ORDER RE DEF PETITION FOR RECALL OF SENTNCE PUR 1170,18PC SIGNED & FILED

/CAL RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170,03/DEF IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM SOLNO STATE PRISON, CDCR# V32822/X:PC 1170,03 PETITION FOR RESENTENCING IS GRANTED,/CTORD:GUILTY FINDING OF COUNT 1 SET ASIDE, AND MURDER CONVICTION OFCOUNT 1 VACATED & DISMISSED/X:COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT GUILTY OF THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF   COUNT 1, PC 192(A), VOLUNTARY MANSLAUGHTER, AND RESENTENCES THE DEFENDANT ON ALL COUNTS AS FOLLOWS:/CH5:SP 11Y/X:AS TO COUNT 2, A VIOLATION OF PC 459, A FELONY IN THE SECOND DEGREE, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 8-MONTHS STATE PRISON, ONE-THIRD THE  MIDTERM, TO RUN CONSECUTIVE TO NEWLY AMENDED COUNT 1,/X:AS TO COUNT 4, A VIOLATION OF PC 240, A MISDEMEANOR, DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 6 MONTHS COUNTY JAIL WITH CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 6 MONTHS TO RUN CONCURRENT TO COUNTS 1 AND 2/X:TOTAL STATE PRISON = 11 YEARS, 8 MONTHS/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THE AMOUNT TO BE CALCULATED BY CDCR/2933,1(C)/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED/DEF:WAIVES ANY EXCESS CREDITS TO THE EXTENT OF ALLOWING A STANDARD PAROLE SUPERVISION PERIOD/X:VICTIM RESTITUTION, FINES & FEES REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/PAROLE70/PARDATE:AS DIRECTED BY CDCR/PAR70/

/CAL RULING ON PC 1170,03 PETITION/DEF IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM SOLANO STTE PRISON, CDCR# V32822/X:VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT READ ONTO THE RECORD BYDANA DRUSINSKY,/X:VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT GIVEN BY BOB AMUNDSON AND JEAN PETERS,/X:BYRON JOHNSON, DEFENDANT'S BROTHER, READS A STATEMENT ONTO THE RECORD,/

/CAL:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON PEOPLE'S PC 1170,03 PETITION/DEF:IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM SOLANO STATE PRISON, CDCR# V32822/X:CARMELITA HAYTER, DARRELLSIMMONS AND BYRON JOHNSON, ALL PRESENT VIA ZOOM, SPEAK IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT,/X:COURT TENTATIVELY GRANTS PC 1170,03 PETITION FOR RESENTENCE,/ /CONTD:RULING ON PC 1170,03 PETITION/
/CAL:TS DA MOTION FOR RESENTENCING PURUSANT TO PC 1170/DEF:IS PRESENT VIAZOOM FROM SOLANO STATE PRISON, CDCR# V32822/CONTD:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON PEOPLE'S PC 1170,03 PETITION/
/CA: DA MOTION FOR RESENTENCING PC 1170/DAWT/X: MATTER ASSIGNED TO JUDGECONROY FOR ALL PURPOSES/CONTD: TO SET DA MOTION FOR RESENTENCING PC 1170 IN S25/

/CAL: HEARING ON DETERMINATION OF PRIMA FACIE CASE HEARD BY JUDGE CYNTHIA LEE/X: DEFENSE'S CO-COUNSEL, MAYA PERELMAN, IS PRESENT/X: COURT REVIEWS RESPONSE FROM THE PEOPLE AND REPLY FROM ATTORNEY PERELMAN/ARG&SUB/X: COURTFINDS DEFENDANT HAS NOT MET PRIMA FACIE BASIS/X: DEFENSE'S PETITION PER PC1170,95(C) IS DENIED/X: DEFENDANT TO BE RETURNED TO STATE PRISON/
/CAL:HEARING ON DETERMINATION OF PRIMA FACIE CASE (TBH BY JUDGE LEE)/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 25, FORTHWITH; TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, FOR HEARING,/
/CAL:HEARING ON DETERMINATION OF PRIMA FACIE CASE (TBH BY JUDGE LEE)/NP/X:THIS PROCEEDING IS NOT REPORTED,/X:PARTIES AGREED VIA EMAIL TO CONTINUE THE MATTER TO 09-25-19 AT 1:30 P,M,/CONT/DOPC/

/CAL:HEARING ON ARGUMENTS RE PRIMA FACIE CASE ON PC1170,95 PETITION & DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE (TBH BY JUDGE LEE)/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED WITHOUT OPPOSITION,/CONTD:TO SET HEARING ON DETERMINATION OF PRIMAFACIE CASE BEFORE JUDGE LEE/DOP/

/AJW/LIFE 1//X:ALLEGATION OF SPECIAL CIRCUMSTANCES PURSUANT TO 190,2(A)(17)PC FOUND TRUE BY THE JURY/CH2:SP2Y:M/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 1870 DAYS COUNTY JAIL/X:COUNTS 1 & 2 ARE TO RUN CONCURRENT/STATES/VF5:200/CDC/APPEAL/TWS/CH4:CJ6M/X:DEFENDANT RECEIVED 6 MONTHS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVEDAS TO COUNT 4,/TEXT/5A/5B/
